headline: Shares of several banks and financial services companies are trading higher amid overall market strength as investors anticipate this week's Fed Reserve meeting.
summary: Shares of several banks and financial services companies are trading higher amid overall market strength as investors anticipate this week's Fed Reserve meeting.

raw.headline: Shares of several banks and financial services companies are trading higher amid overall market strength as investors anticipate this week's Fed Reserve meeting.

headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Vistra, Raises Price Target to $298
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Andrew Weisel   maintains Vistra (NYSE:VST) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $293 to $298.
